hints.text: Plates **black w/ white text** (military plates: small Tunisian flag left — visible on the dark-green follow car)
hints.uniq_note: Black plates in an Arabic-French country = Tunisia (UAE/Jordan plates are white).

hints.text: A **follow car escorts the Google car** in most coverage (several types; may be ahead or FAR behind — pan around!); the Google car itself is **black w/ a medium thin antenna**
Climates: Mediterranean → dry → semi-desert; **olive plantations** in neat rows on raked weedless soil along many roads
Road lines usually **white** (outer dashed or solid; a few Sfax roads have yellow middles)
Direction signs: white background, towns in **Arabic + Latin** w/ a distinctive Latin font ('Tunis' listed everywhere — doesn't mean you're close!)
Traditional **'Tunisian blue'** doors, windows & gates — everywhere, most of all on Djerba
hints.uniq_note: The specific blue shade on whitewashed walls is a Tunisia signature.

shared_with.diff: French + follow car → Tunisia; Hebrew → Israel.

hints.text: White concrete **km markers w/ rounded red/yellow/green top** — sides show distances to towns, road-facing side the road number → great for pinpointing
Fairly unique **stop sign w/ Arabic + Latin text**

shared_with.note: Israel/Palestine use the HAND stop sign.

hints.text: Coverage mostly the **east coast Bizerte→Medenine**, main roads + big towns (Djerba has dense side streets)

**Follow car = region**: light-green Toyota → far north (never south of Hammamet); dark-green Mazda (military plate w/ red strip) → Hammamet→Djerba (most common); Tunis = many different ones; Kairouan = white **Mitsubishi** w/ white mirrors; **Djerba = usually NO follow car** (rare white Mercedes/dark-green)

**Landscape north→south**: north of Tunis = Mediterranean hills, fallow fields; Tunis↔Hammamet = higher greener hills; Hammamet↔Gabès = flat & arid w/ olives (drier southward); south of Gabès = semi-desert w/ rubbish + small white rocks + a range far SW; **Djerba** = palms + whitewashed traditional buildings w/ blue doors

**Spotlights**: Bizerte Lake = teal water + slight hills south; mass of palms in one place → **Gabès**; sandy hills → P1 NW of Medenine (south is otherwise flat); P12 off-road SW of Sousse = dark pavement + bright sand, prickly pears east; **Djerba-Zarzis causeway** = water both sides + pipeline west; trekkers all over (forts, mosques, a **Star Wars set**)
